name: 功能建议 / Feature Request
about: 为 Atrium 提供建议 / Suggest an idea for Atrium
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
body:
    - type: textarea
      attributes:
        label: 描述 / Description
        description: 请清晰描述您想要的功能。 / Please clear describe the feature you'd like.

    - type: textarea
      attributes:
        label: 使用场景 / Use Case
        description: 请描述您想要的功能的使用场景。 / Please describe the use case of the feature you'd like.

    - type: textarea
      attributes:
        label: 为什么需要这个功能 / Why is this feature needed?
        description: 为什么需要这个功能？它解决了什么问题？ / Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

    - type: textarea
      attributes:
        label: 提出的解决方案 / Proposed Solution
        description: 如果你有关于如何实现这一点的想法。 / If you have ideas on how to implement this.

    - type: textarea
      attributes:
        label: 考虑的替代方案 / Alternatives Considered
        description: 请描述您考虑过的其他解决方案或功能。 / Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.
